avatar.name: Avatar
avatar.description: Use when showing a user profile picture, initials circle, or entity identity marker — typically circular with fixed dimensions and a single child image.

badge.name: Badge
badge.description: Use when labeling a status, count, or category next to another element — a small pill-shaped tag with a single label child centered inside.

bar chart.name: Bar Chart
bar chart.description: Use when visualizing comparative categorical data — composed of header, chart canvas with rect bars, and legend.

button.name: Button
button.description: Use when offering a clickable action trigger such as submit, continue, or cancel — composed of an optional leading icon, a label, and an optional trailing icon aligned center.

card.name: Card
card.description: Use when grouping related content into a surface container — composed of optional header, content area, and footer with vertical stacking.

checkbox.name: Checkbox
checkbox.description: Use when offering a binary on/off toggle for a single option in forms or settings — composed of a box and adjacent label aligned center.

dialog.name: Dialog
dialog.description: Use when requesting user confirmation or showing a focused modal message — composed of optional icon, title, message body, and action button row.

divider.name: Divider
divider.description: Use when separating sections or groups with a thin horizontal or vertical line — a fill-width rule with no children.

dropdown.name: Dropdown Menu
dropdown.description: Use when showing a popover list of options triggered by a button or input — composed of a container frame holding stacked menu items.

feature grid.name: Feature Grid
feature grid.description: Use when showcasing product features in a marketing or landing page section — composed of a section header and a grid container of feature tiles.

form.name: Form
form.description: Use when building a complete form layout with multiple input fields — composed of a stacked fields section and a submit action row.

form field.name: Form Field
form field.description: Use when assembling a complete form input group — composed of a label, an input control, and optional helper or error text stacked vertically.

hero section.name: Hero Section
hero section.description: Use when creating the above-the-fold banner of a landing page — composed of content block (headline, subhead, CTA) and optional visual or image area.

input.name: Input Field
input.description: Use when collecting text input from the user — composed of a label and an input container with placeholder text or value.

line chart.name: Line Chart
line chart.description: Use when visualizing trends over time or continuous series — composed of header, chart canvas with line strokes and axes, and legend.

list.name: List
list.description: Use when displaying a stacked vertical collection of similar items — a fill-width container that holds multiple list items.

list item.name: List Item
list item.description: Use when rendering one row inside a list — composed of optional leading icon, content block, and trailing action aligned center in a horizontal row.

modal.name: Modal
modal.description: Use when overlaying a focused task container on top of the page — composed of header, content body, and footer with action buttons.

nav bar.name: Navigation Bar
nav bar.description: Use when building the top-level app navigation row — composed of logo, navigation links, and actions with space-between distribution.

pie chart.name: Pie Chart
pie chart.description: Use when visualizing proportions as parts of a whole — composed of a circular canvas with slices and a vertical legend alongside.

pricing table.name: Pricing Table
pricing table.description: Use when presenting multiple SaaS pricing tiers side by side — composed of 3 pricing cards (basic, pro, enterprise) arranged horizontally and centered.

radio.name: Radio
radio.description: Use when offering a single-choice selection from a group of mutually exclusive options — composed of a circle marker and adjacent label.

sidebar.name: Sidebar
sidebar.description: Use when building the vertical side navigation for a dashboard or app shell — composed of header (logo), nav links, and footer (user profile) filling full height.

switch.name: Switch
switch.description: Use when offering an instant on/off toggle in settings — a fixed-size pill track with a sliding thumb indicating state.

tab list.name: Tab List
tab list.description: Use when rendering just the horizontal row of tab headers without content — a fill-width row of tab buttons.

table.name: Table
table.description: Use when displaying structured tabular data with columns and rows — composed of a header row and a body of data rows, filling container width.

tabs.name: Tabs
tabs.description: Use when switching between multiple content panes that share the same space — composed of a tab list row and the active tab content area stacked below.

toast.name: Toast
toast.description: Use when showing a transient notification message after a user action — composed of optional icon, content text, and close button in a horizontal row.
